definitions: A verbal mistake that is thought to reveal an unconscious belief, thought, or emotion.
An unintentional error in speech or action that is presumed to be caused by an unconscious desire or conflict.
examples: He made a Freudian slip when he called his new boss 'Mom'.
Her Freudian slip about wanting to go home revealed her true feelings.
It was a classic Freudian slip, mixing up the names of his ex-girlfriends.
